Localization.Description: Attempt of a federated user to log in to the application

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Federated user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the application on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}."
Federated user {subject.account.name} is logging in to the application on host {event_src.host}
Federated user {subject.account.name} logged in to the application on host {event_src.host}
